item.title: 1.1.1-beta.1
item.description:
## What's Changed * fix(stats): stop activation count resetting on every launch by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/4 * refactor(tray): drop product name from About and Quit items by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/5 * feat(tray): switch the locked input source from the menu by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/6
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/compare/v1.1.0-beta.2...v1.1.1-beta.1

## What's Changed * fix(appicon): mask shipped icons for older macOS by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/2 * fix(lock): stop CJKV nudge from resetting the mouse pointer by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/3
* docs(readme): ship translations for all 9 app languages ([`8a6ef76`](https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/commit/8a6ef767be63d4519a48280239df191d2c337119)) * fix(release): link commit hashes in fallback release notes ([`fdc6e90`](https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/commit/fdc6e9072a5938142f76ad367e414d8433263f3e)) * feat: add Homebrew install via custom tap cask ([`fcd6e6c`](https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/commit/fcd6e6cbbf08dd39ddfdc061486215bffbfe3adc)) * ci(release): always list direct-push commits in release notes ([`1ac2d8b`](https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/commit/1ac2d8bb8e66866f476503f0effc7e77af667761)) * docs(readme): center the title and add the app icon ([`a2388fd`](https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/commit/a2388fd2370ebd01673e1f416b3fc697a2f353b6))
## New Contributors * @BlackHole1 made their first contribution in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/2
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/compare/v1.1.0...v1.1.1

item.title: 1.1.0-beta.2
item.description:
## What's Changed * fix(appicon): mask shipped icons for older macOS by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/2 * fix(lock): stop CJKV nudge from resetting the mouse pointer by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/3
* feat: add Homebrew install via custom tap cask ([`fcd6e6c`](https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/commit/fcd6e6cbbf08dd39ddfdc061486215bffbfe3adc)) * ci(release): always list direct-push commits in release notes ([`1ac2d8b`](https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/commit/1ac2d8bb8e66866f476503f0effc7e77af667761)) * docs(readme): center the title and add the app icon ([`a2388fd`](https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/commit/a2388fd2370ebd01673e1f416b3fc697a2f353b6))
## New Contributors * @BlackHole1 made their first contribution in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/2
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/compare/v1.1.0-beta.1...v1.1.0-beta.2

## What's Changed
* fix(release): embed update notes as markdown, not HTML (`2d738ea`) * docs(readme): add shields.io badges, center header (`3daa2bf`) * feat: support macOS 14+ and Intel Macs via per-arch builds (`4f28942`)
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/compare/v1.0.2...v1.1.0
